description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock and forearm, with a long, slender metal barrel extending from the receiver. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, matte metal, contrasting with the warm brown wood of the stock. The rifle includes a traditional trigger guard and a simple iron sight system mounted on top of the barrel. The magazine is internal, with no visible detachable box or drum. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military rifles, with clean lines and minimal external attachments. The muzzle is plain, lacking any visible suppressor, brake, or flash hider.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and iron sights, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and a hint of the front sight.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the wooden stock, metal receiver, and barrel, with the trigger and iron sights visible.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the slimness of the stock and barrel, with the rear sight barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, metal barrel, and iron sights, with the bolt handle visible.
